finding_ref.description: Reference to the finding being traced (finding_id, file+line, or index).

reachable.description: Whether attacker-controlled input can reach the vulnerable sink.

confidence.description: Confidence in the reachability verdict (0.0 to 1.0).

rationale.description: Detailed reasoning: how input flows from source to sink, any sanitization, blockers.

trace_path.description: Step-by-step data flow trace from source to sink.

step.description: What happens at this step in the data flow.

role.description: Role of this step in the data flow.

input_source.description: Description of the attacker-controlled input source (e.g., HTTP query param, file upload, WebSocket message).

sink.description: Description of the dangerous sink (e.g., SQL query, OS command, file write).

sanitization_present.description: Whether any sanitization or validation was found in the trace path.

sanitization_bypassable.description: If sanitization is present, whether it can be bypassed.
